chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3451 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on Misc.No.15137/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 07.04.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent Per learned counsel for the respondent, the Department shall withdraw the impugned notice forthwith subject to the right to initiate proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
